name: Configure SEB Client Connection
description: Create and activate a new SEB Client Connection Configuration named 'Campus Lockdown Browser Config' for campus-wide deployment on the SEB Server (http://localhost:8080, credentials: super-admin / admin). Use password 'ExamQuit2024', enable the 'With Fallback' option, and set the fallback start URL to 'https://exam.university.edu/login'.
